creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Champion!

Just to clarify (for our future selves / others), that accounts that had realnames set (such as python@f.o, as "FreeBSD Python Team") have had their realnames reset to "<foo> mailing-list". They can / will need to be updated to their 'user friendly' names again, in particular for the "FreeBSD Foo Team" cases
